name: XORIndex Loader
description: [XORIndex Loader](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1248) is a XOR-encoded loader that collects host data, decodes follow-on scripts and acts as a downloader for the [BeaverTail](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1246) malware.
